prestazioni: Engine swap to a **4ZE1-TC** (2.6L turbocharged inline-4, 160 HP stock) with a **Garrett GT2860RS-5** turbocharger, upgraded **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons** (8.5:1 compression), and **Manley Performance forged connecting rods** for 300+ WHP on E85 fuel

Full **ISUZU 4ZE1-TC-specific** standalone ECU conversion using a **Haltech Elite 2500** with custom wiring harness by **Painless Performance**, paired with **ID1000x injectors** and a **Walbro 450 LPH fuel pump** for high-flow fuel delivery

Chassis reinforcement via **ISUZU Amigo S-specific** **Cusco 4-point roll cage** (bolt-in, no welding required) and **Polyurethane bushings** from **Energy Suspension** (part #9.5101G) for subframe and control arms, combined with **Ohlins DFV coilovers** (custom valved for the Amigo’s 103.5-inch wheelbase)
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Amigo S** widebody kit (fiberglass, bolt-on fenders with 2.5-inch flares) paired with **Work Emotion CR Kiwami** 17x9 +12 wheels and **Federal 595 RS-RR** 255/40/17 tires for aggressive stance

**Seibon Carbon** hood (OEM replacement, 30% weight reduction) with **AEM 3.5-inch cold air intake** routed through the fender for heat soak reduction, finished with **VHT Flameproof** matte black engine bay coating

**ISUZU Amigo S-specific** **JDM-spec** front bumper lip from **Vertex Lang** (rare, discontinued) and **custom LED taillight conversion** using **Morimoto XB35** projectors with **Diode Dynamics SS360** sequential turn signals
